arts.ttl: Video: Dembele and Barcola’s Instant Chemistry Powers PSG’s Opening Strike
arts.sum: In their final tune-up match before their clash against Liverpool, PSG opened up the scoring early at the Parc des Princes against a LOSC Lille side who also have an eye on the UEFA Champions League first-leg contest against Borussia Dortmund. Bradley Barcola switched the play to Dembélé, who did his signature move. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Plot Raid of €40M-Rated Talent, Fueling Arsenal, PSG’s Transfer Plans
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months, nearly securing a deal last summer. Now, they’re making another push to sign him. Journalist Christian Falk recently reported that PSG are still strongly interested in Kimmich, whose contract situation at Bayern Munich remains unresolved. arts.ttl: Liverpool Set to Shake up Transfer Market With Three-Way Swap for €180M-Rated Newcastle Star Amid PSG Links
arts.sum: The winter transfer window has closed, and for now, Alexander Isak is still with Newcastle United. There wasn’t much chatter about a move this winter, but expect several clubs to revisit the idea in the summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal Willing to Negotiate for €60M-Rated Juventus Ace Amid Man Utd, PSG Interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s decision to move on from Randal Kolo Muani opens the door for the club to bring in a new No. 9 to pair with Gonçalo Ramos this summer. One potential target is Juventus forward Dusan Vlahovic. arts.ttl: Biggest ever upset? The French giant-killers aiming to down PSG
arts.sum: Stade Briochin are the fourth-tier club who have gone from narrowly avoiding extinction to a series of Coupe de France giant killings, with PSG next on their list.

arts.sum: Lucas Chevalier (23), under contract with Lille OSC until 2027, could be on the move this summer, amid interest from some of Europe’s top clubs. As per Le Parisien, AC Milan are…

arts.ttl: Messi 'wasn't happy on a daily basis' at PSG
arts.sum: Eight-time Men's Ballon d'Or winner Lionel Messi says he "didn't enjoy" playing for French club Paris St-Germain during his two-year spell and was "unhappy."
